meaning: n.莱索托(非洲南部一王国,首都Maseru)
examples: The former military ruler of Lesotho has been placed under house arrest.
Lesotho: new national policies to improve mental health.
The Kingdom of Lesotho is completely bounded by South Africa.
This was partly because a high proportion of Lesotho's women go to school and work.
South African mines and farms have long employed workers from Lesotho, Malawi or Zimbabwe.
